name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 [New] Mini Bucket Shoulder Bag. This mini bucket shoulder bag is crafted in red leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbed shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Ivory red leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbed shoulder strap, cotton-linen blend lining, zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, shoulder strap (42cm high) hook closure.
name_cn:
💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 [New] Mini Bucket Shoulder Bag. This mini bucket shoulder bag is crafted in red leather. This accessory features a hook closure and a webbed shoulder strap design, cleverly blending functionality and modernity. Ivory red leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, red and green webbed shoulder strap, cotton-linen blend lining, zip pocket, Gucci logo zip pull, shoulder strap (42cm high) hook closure.
Model: 782908.
Dimensions: 18.5(L) x 20.5(W) x 12.5cm(H)
Color: Red/Original Leather.
Made in Italy
Model height: 177cm
Weight: approx. 0.450kg
